title: Pink Bear's Perfect Easter
premise: When snow buries Easter morning, Pink Bear discovers that sometimes the best plans are the ones you have to rebuild together.
character_description: A optimistic stuffed bear with button eyes and soft pink velvet fur, who believes in making things possible even when they seem impossible.
world_description: Susie's bedroom and garden in a New England spring, where indoor and outdoor worlds collide.
style_anchor: Warm 2D picture book style for 'Pink Bear's Perfect Easter'. Soft lighting, rich saturated colours, clean 2D illustrative lines. Character: Pink Bear — A optimistic stuffed bear with button eyes and soft pink velvet fur, who believes in making things possible even when they seem impossible.. World: Susie's bedroom and garden in a New England spring, where indoor and outdoor worlds collide.. Consistent look across all 12 pages.
character_visual_notes: Appearance of a small, well-loved teddy bear, approximately 12 inches tall, with soft dusty rose velvet fur.
Shiny black, perfectly round button eyes, always conveying a gentle, hopeful, and optimistic gaze.
A small, pale yellow linen smock dress, with two tiny pearl buttons at the back.
A tiny, hand-stitched crimson heart charm, sewn onto her left paw.
Her soft, dusty rose velvet fur, with a subtle, iridescent shimmer.
